word: G2589 - καρδιογνώστης - kardiognṓstēs - kar-dee-og-noce'-tace - Which knowest the hearts

sections.paragraph:
- Original: καρδιογνώστης

- Transliteration: Kardiognostes

- Phonetic: kar-dee-og-noce'-tace

- Definition:

1. knower of the hearts

- Origin: from G2588 and G1097

- TDNT entry: 13:13,4

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G2588 and G1097; a heart knower: - which knowest the hearts.
